name: 15 Pocket Over-the-Door Hanging Shoe Storage Tan - Brightroom™
description:
Make use of your closet door for organization of your shoe collection with the 15-Pocket Over-the-Door Hanging Shoe Storage from Brightroom™. This tan hanging shoe storage features fifteen mesh pockets to give you ample space for shoes as well as belts and other accessories. Made of fabric, it is easy to hang over the door with the triple hooks.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
